# Roadmap Task

- Closes/Fixes/Resolves #
- Project: Slopgate Roadmap

Roadmap work must close exactly one roadmap issue with `Closes #<issue>`,
`Fixes #<issue>`, `Resolves #<issue>`, or the repository-scoped form
`Closes messagesgoel-blip/slopgate#<issue>` unless the PR is explicitly labeled
`no-roadmap-task`.

## Summary

- What changed:
- Why:

## Validation

- [ ] Relevant tests/checks passed
- [ ] No deploy impact, or deploy impact is documented

```bash
# paste commands run here
```

## Review

- [ ] All actionable review findings resolved
